src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/service/uti.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 11+ compatibility.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/service/uti.why_exists: Paths.get() is not removed, but Path.of() is the preferred modern API introduced in Java 11; this change is part of a modernization recipe, not a strict compile fix for J21, but often flagged by linters. However, strictly speaking, Paths.get() still compiles on J21. The prompt asks for 'breaking' only if it won't compile/run. Since Paths.get() works on J21, this is polishment.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/service/uti.general_idea: Fix potential command injection or parsing issue by splitting command string for Runtime.exec().
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/service/uti.why_exists: Runtime.getRuntime().exec(String) splits on whitespace, which can fail if arguments contain spaces or special characters. Using exec(String[]) is safer and more robust. This is a bug fix/polishment, not a JDK version breaking change.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Comment out deprecated Elasticsearch transport client configuration to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x removes support for the deprecated Elasticsearch transport client; leaving this configuration active may cause startup failures or runtime errors due to missing or incompatible client implementations.

            # properties:
            #     path:
            #         home: target/elasticsearch

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate metrics export configuration from the deprecated Micrometer registry structure to the new Spring Boot 3.3 property format.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: The nested 'management.metrics.export.prometheus' path is deprecated/removed in Spring Boot 3.3; using it results in configuration binding failures or ignored settings.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
management:
    metrics:
        export:
            prometheus:
                enabled: true
                step: 60

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate metrics binder configuration from the deprecated 'management.metrics.binders' structure to the new 'management.metrics.enable' property format.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: The 'management.metrics.binders' path is deprecated/removed in Spring Boot 3.3; using it results in configuration binding failures or ignored settings.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
management:
    metrics:
        binders:
            jvm:
                enabled: true
            processor:
                enabled: true
            uptime:
                enabled: true
            logback:
                enabled: true
            files:
                enabled: true
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
    enable.process.files: true
    enable.jvm: true
    enable.logback: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Remove deprecated web server auto-time-requests configuration which is no longer supported in Spring Boot 3.3.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: The property 'management.metrics.web.server.auto-time-requests' is deprecated/removed in Spring Boot 3.3; using it results in configuration binding failures.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
management:
    metrics:
        web:
            server:
                auto-time-requests: true

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Remove deprecated MVC favicon configuration which is no longer supported in Spring Boot 3.3.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: The property 'spring.mvc.favicon.enabled' is deprecated/removed in Spring Boot 3.3; using it results in configuration binding failures.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/config/WebC.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 annotations to JUnit 5 annotations to align with Spring Boot 3 test dependencies.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/config/WebC.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.*) are no longer on the classpath or supported by default in Spring Boot 3, causing NoClassDefFoundError or compilation errors if JUnit 5 is the primary test engine.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/config/WebC.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/config/WebC.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires Jakarta EE 9+, which moved the servlet API from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet. Using javax.servlet results in ClassNotFoundException or compilation errors.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/repository/.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 annotations to JUnit 5 equivalents required by Spring Boot 3.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/repository/.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.Test, org.junit.Before) are not present in JUnit 5; Spring Boot 3 requires JUnit 5 for testing.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/repository/.general_idea: Remove JUnit 4 runner annotation as Spring Boot 3 uses JUnit 5 platform.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/repository/.why_exists: org.junit.runner.RunWith and SpringRunner are JUnit 4 artifacts; Spring Boot 3 test context does not support the JUnit 4 runner.
org.junit.Before is not available in JUnit 5; test lifecycle methods must use org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/repository/.general_idea: Migrate javax.servlet imports to jakarta.servlet for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/repository/.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 runs on Jakarta EE 9+, where javax.servlet packages have been renamed to jakarta.servlet; javax.servlet.http.HttpSession no longer exists.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/repository/.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() using Java 21 API.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/Do.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @RunWith(SpringRunner.class) with Spring Boot 3 native test support.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/Do.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires JUnit 5; @RunWith is a JUnit 4 annotation and will cause compilation or runtime errors in a JUnit 5 environment.
JUnit 5 does not recognize @Before; tests will fail to initialize properly or fail to compile if the annotation is not found.
JUnit 5 @Test does not support the 'expected' attribute; using it results in a compilation error or ignored expectation.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/Do.general_idea: Update imports from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/Do.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes are not available in a pure JUnit 5 setup; missing imports cause compilation errors.
The class is no longer used after removing @RunWith; keeping it is unnecessary but not strictly breaking, however it's part of the JUnit 4 cleanup.
Required for the new assertThrows usage; without it, the code won't compile.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/Se.general_idea: Migrate test annotation from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/Se.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JUnit 5; JUnit 4 classes like org.junit.Test are no longer supported or detected by the test runner, causing tests to be skipped or fail to compile if dependencies are removed.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/jw.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 import to JUnit 5 import for the BeforeEach lifecycle annotation.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/jw.why_exists: Compile error: org.junit.Before is not available in JUnit 5; JUnit 5 uses org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach.
